## Test plan

- [ ] `just lint` passes
- [ ] `just test` passes
- [ ] If touching detection: inline tests added for new / changed patterns

- [ ] If touching the CLI: README CLI examples still accurate
- [ ] README pattern table updated (if pattern count changed)
- [ ] No live secrets in test fixtures (use `concat!()` to defeat push protection if needed)
